risks.statement: Production identity, tenant binding, and authorization journeys have not been independently exercised end to end.
Backup, point-in-time recovery, restore, and disaster-recovery evidence for the production database topology is NOT_RUN.
The supported deployment matrix, upgrade, rollback, and mixed-version paths have not run in representative environments.
Load, soak, capacity, failure injection, alert routing, incident response, and recovery objectives remain NOT_RUN.
Independent security, privacy, tenant-isolation, and supply-chain review has not been supplied.
Generated starters intentionally use in-memory storage and omit identity until an approved production profile is selected.
Provider, hardware, vendor-platform, customer, economics, and independent certification evidence remains NOT_RUN.
